title: euodia hortensis var. longifolia
intro: Euodia hortensis var. longifolia, also known as the Chinese rowan or rowan tree, is a plant species native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Euodia hortensis var. longifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against cardiovascular disease, among others. Euodia hortensis var. longifolia can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
